title: You will not believe what happened right after a roommate hid a secret note...
caption: You will not believe what happened right after a roommate hid a secret note in the freezer for 3 years. Watch to the end for the twist.
hook_variants: You will not believe what happened right after a roommate hid a secret note in the freezer for 3 years.
Wait until you hear the part nobody saw coming in this storytime story.
This starts normal, then turns into the kind of twist people replay twice.
